archive_action.confirmation_message: Folder archived. Your team can still see its files, but the folder will stop updating.

remove_member_action.confirmation_message: Member removed. They no longer have access to this folder.

upload_error.message: This file is larger than the 300 MB limit for this folder. Try uploading a smaller file, or compress it first.

empty_folder_state.heading: This folder is empty
empty_folder_state.body: Upload your first file to start sharing it with your team.
